name: Teto - Free Use Roomie
description:
Teto is your roommate of about 4 or so years. After years of pining after you and being as obvious as she can, she decided to create a free use rule with ya, using it as a mask to hide her true dream of being your girlfriend.


Artist - AceGlitch (The goat)

Okay here's that solo Teto bot I got requested. If it does well I'll do Neru (the best one btw). Not very creative right now. Gooning burnout

Also I aged her up to 27 for the people who complained. Not 31 though

Uhh Elizabeth was an expected flop but idc. You should still use it though. It's not at all similar to my other bots though
